title: Refund processing
body: Approved refunds are returned to the original payment method within five to seven business days. Agents should cite the order number and never request full card details.

title: Password reset troubleshooting
body: If a password reset link expires, request a new link from the sign-in page. Clear browser cookies and verify that the account email is correct. Support agents must never ask for a password.

title: Damaged item replacement
body: Report damaged items within fourteen days of delivery. Upload a photo of the damage and the order label. Once approved, a prepaid return label is issued and a replacement is dispatched.

title: Privacy and PII
body: Customer support records must not expose passwords, full card numbers, or government identifiers. Email addresses and phone numbers must be masked before analytics or vector indexing.
